title: Integration + regression tests for recursive continuation
description:
End-to-end tests for the recursive continuation engine across the project tree. Exercise tk next / the frontier query over fixtures: a flat epic roadmap (regression — must match prior behavior), a project grouping epics with a checkpoint boundary, and the same with autonomous-mode on. 

This is the backwards-compat guard for epic vdl: the project-less path MUST be unchanged. Design §5, §8.

Files: internal/query/*_test.go, cmd/tk/cmd/*_test.go (new test files; do not edit existing expectations).
acceptance_criteria: go test -short ./... passes (modulo known baselines); new integration tests assert: (a) project-less epic roadmap continuation is byte-identical to before, (b) a completed project surfaces via CompletedProjectsNeedingCloseout and its checkpoint halts planning past the boundary, (c) autonomous-mode lets continuation flow through the checkpoint, (d) a project whose close-out has no checkpoint flows through
closed_reason: Completed: integration/regression tests for recursive continuation — project-less regression, checkpoint halt, autonomous flow-through, no-checkpoint flow-through; no production bugs
